required_preferences.fact: Relies on the office cafeteria or nearby lunch spots for weekday meals—no longer pre-schedules meal delivery for lunch

supersedes.fact: Pre-schedules meal delivery for weekdays to ensure lunch is available—never orders takeout on impulse

required_preferences.fact: Attends physical therapy sessions after work on weekday evenings—does not schedule pilates or fitness classes

supersedes.fact: Schedules pilates classes during weekday evenings only—never goes on weekends to keep Saturdays and Sundays free

required_preferences.fact: Plans and prepares home-cooked meals each evening during her parents' stay, actively involving them in meal prep—pauses weekly outing dinners with coworkers for these two weeks
Maintains a shared digital document tracking her grandmother’s care updates, medications, and family visit calendar—never relies on ad hoc texting or informal notes
Keeps a list of local art galleries to visit and aims to see a new one each quarter—never goes to large museums
Invites her two close coworkers for after-work dinners at least once a week—never mixes work and personal topics during these outings

persona: A 28-year-old account executive at a fast-growing SaaS startup
